books.title: The Art of War
books.author: Sun Tzu
books.description: A Chinese military treatise written during the 6th century BC by Sun Tzu. One of the oldest and most famous studies of strategy.

books.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
books.author: Lewis Carroll
books.description: A children's classic by Lewis Carroll. Alice follows a rabbit down a hole into a fantastical world filled with peculiar creatures and adventures.

books.title: Dracula
books.author: Bram Stoker
books.description: The classic vampire story by Bram Stoker. Count Dracula attempts to move from Transylvania to England, and the battle between good and evil begins.

books.title: Peter Pan
books.author: J. M. Barrie
books.description: The well-loved story of three children and their adventures in Neverland with the boy who refuses to grow up.
